ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of study (e.g., 'visual search', 'reading') */,
  "participant_age_range" TEXT /* Age range of participants (e.g., '18-25', '26-35') */,
  "participant_gender" TEXT /* Gender of participants (e.g., 'male', 'female', 'both') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the participant is part of */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cameras" (
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camera */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the camera is used in */,
  "camera_type" TEXT /* Type of camera (e.g., 'infrared', 'RGB') */,
  "camera_angle" REAL /* Angle of the camera (in degrees) */,
  "camera_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the camera (e.g., '1080p', '4K') */,
  "camera_frame_rate" INTEGER /* Frame rate of the camera (in frames per second) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("camera_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cameras_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gaze_data" (
  "gaze_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gaze data point */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who generated the gaze data */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the gaze data was collected in */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gaze data was collected */,
  "gaze_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the gaze point */,
  "gaze_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the gaze point */,
  "gaze_z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the gaze point */,
  "gaze_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the gaze (in milliseconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gaze_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gaze_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gaze_data_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pupil_data" (
  "pupil_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pupil data point */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who generated the pupil data */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the pupil data was collected in */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pupil data was collected */,
  "left_pupil_diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the left pupil */,
  "right_pupil_diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the right pupil */,
  "pupil_dilation_speed" REAL /* Speed of pupil dilation (in mm/s) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pupil_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pupil_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pupil_data_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "eye_openness_data" (
  "eye_openness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each eye openness data point */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who generated the eye openness data */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the eye openness data was collected in */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the eye openness data was collected */,
  "left_eye_openness" REAL /* Openness of the left eye (0-1) */,
  "right_eye_openness" REAL /* Openness of the right eye (0-1) */,
  "eye_movement_speed" REAL /* Speed of eye movement (in degrees/s) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eye_openness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_eye_openness_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_eye_openness_data_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_design" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment design */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the design is for */,
  "design_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment design */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment design */,
  "stimuli_type" TEXT /* Type of stimuli used (e.g., 'visual', 'auditory') */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of task performed by participants (e.g., 'search', 'reading') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_design_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "camera_calibration" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camera calibration */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera the calibration is for */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the camera was calibrated */,
  "camera_matrix" TEXT /* Camera intrinsic matrix */,
  "distortion_coefficients" TEXT /* Distortion coefficients */,
  "calibration_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the camera calibration (in pixels) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_camera_calibration_camera_id FOREIGN KEY ("camera_id") REFERENCES cameras ("camera_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_export" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the data is from */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date the data was exported */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., 'CSV', 'JSON') */,
  "export_file" TEXT /* Exported data file */,
  "export_size" INTEGER /* Size of the exported data file (in bytes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_export_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data validation */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the data is from */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date the data was validated */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the data validation (e.g., 'pass', 'fail') */,
  "validation_message" TEXT /* Message describing the validation result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_session" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant session */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who participated in the session */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the session is part of */,
  "session_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "session_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_session_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_session_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimuli_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the stimulus is used in */,
  "stimuli_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus (e.g., 'visual', 'auditory') */,
  "stimuli_name" TEXT /* Name of the stimulus */,
  "stimuli_description" TEXT /* Description of the stimulus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimuli_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stimuli_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
